scripts.copy:player: echo F | xcopy /Y /F src\player\librespot\target\debug\librespot.exe dist\player\librespot.exe && echo F | xcopy /Y /F src\player\events\target\debug\onevent.exe dist\player\onevent.exe
scripts.copy:player:release: echo F | xcopy /Y /F src\player\librespot\target\release\librespot.exe dist\player\librespot.exe && echo F | xcopy /Y /F src\player\events\target\release\onevent.exe dist\player\onevent.exe
scripts.build:player: cd src/player/librespot && cargo build && cd ../events && cargo build
scripts.build:player:release: cd src/player/librespot && cargo build --release && cd ../events && cargo build --release
scripts.build: npm run build:frontend && npm run copy:frontend && npm run build:player && npm run copy:player && npm run copy:static && npm run build:backend
